mapper.select: SELECT id, sku_id, total_stock, available_stock, sold_stock, version, created_at, updated_at FROM sku_stock WHERE sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sku_stock SET available_stock = available_stock - #{quantity}, sold_stock = sold_stock + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND available_stock >= #{quantity}
